metadata.description: Multi-agent workflow orchestration and PR review plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-workflow
plugins.description: Multi-agent workflow orchestration — branch-per-task development with automated QA, codebase guardian, crash recovery, and 11 workflow commands

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: GitHub PR management suite — listing, filtering, multi-agent parallel review with 6 specialized agents, customizable teams, and claude-workflow integration

plugins.name: claude-agent-manager
plugins.description: Browser dashboard for .claude folder contents, agent activity, and workflow tracking
